he4214c3aga2adg4b7fg8bc1gcb48212bf552: *Your breath catches as you see a Dark Justiciar helmet. The dead must have been Shar's followers.*
ha3a4d24eg5384g4d46gb2a2g5ccdc366226a: *Sharrans raided this place, long ago. There must've been a stronghold in the region.*
h9ac19b8bg2b7ag4bb6gbc2dg5475f8857586: *Your mind races. Your fingertips tingle. If Shar's faith still remain, they could help you.*
h7559219eg2ca9g416ag8167gf8c6a6f2d0b9: *But at the expense of any unfaithful who come with you. They'd surely be doomed...*
h8e4dfdefg46ecg4930ga873g816b27d56551: *You pause. The tingling in your fingertips is growing stronger.*
h0902e6b3g7e0dg44eeg9bbfgcfe221ea5178: Squeeze your fists tight. Will the feeling to subside.
hdaa1209cg97eeg4361gaa23g677fc997db72: Something is on your mind. Speak, and speak plainly.
h7776ee07ge6c4g4f47gbffbg2d16662db9a3: Fine. But see that your 'nothing' does not become 'something'.
h4587a355ga37dg4712g9861g97310667c962: It wasn't nothing - far from it. But I suppose your secrets are yours to keep.
h57268014gbb34g4a76g89bagee2f1f129dda: | If you say so. Come on.|
h5471c17eg1b80g42bagbf4dgd581fe8aadcc: | If you say so. Come on.|
h37dc4b1cg6390g477fg97bdg40cab864c26e: | If you say so. Come on.|
h2c4e6098g56c6g493dg898cg1003d24e61cb: If you say so, my dear.
hfb51e684g1c5bg4fa9g8925ga71cf7dfcbf2: Your lie is as obvious as your ears.
h94531d4eg6cf7g4a13gbf9bg73579cfe093d: I think there may be a stronghold of Shar worshippers nearby.
h1f0c2e3cg4076g4067g9c27gc3ca06c260ee: And how would you know this? Don't tell me - a hunch.
h430c74a0g5bb2g4d14g87ecg6e14058671b7: I saw magic. You're keeping more than your heart hidden in shadow...
h7cf931d9g8705g429dgb952g07145c010b39: I follow Shar. I recognised her signs. But the magic... I don't know what that was.
h79003303g8615g44aag90f4g52e110c52853: Then we tread common ground. Vlaakith is my light; Shar is my darkness.
h6f716adcga9b8g4a2dgb73dgd69b0c2d03b2: Onward, then. Should we meet other Sharrans, we will insist on a reverent welcome.
hf12d3a58g53b6g42degafc6g5626dadd2c04: You worship Shar? Looks like we have a secret in common.
hd373a48cgfacfg4f53g86d3g53b36fd5d60f: It's not easy to pay homage to the dark mistress and Mystra both, but it can be done.
h7e3904d3g2328g43d2gaef9ge8e1e5da1bb0: Good to have found this common ground.
h05750d9cgebd7g4164g9c1fgf36d94d6eaf9: |I knew it. The moment I saw you, I knew you were the same as me.|
h5e16691ag89a0g4f37g8ebcg64c70ca6b939: |I bow to the Nightsinger as well. Your secret is safe with me.|
h2b6b8d43g2df7g4084g8a76gd71ef7ad2bd3: Well aren't we full of surprises?
hc33c33d9ge218g48b0g90d7g7739dc56c3fc: You and I share an interest in dark divinity. But you keep my secrets and I'll keep yours, hmm?
hbfd564a1gadeeg4e8cg885fg84ea46a7a0a8: But let's talk later. Somewhere a little comfortable.
h79944085gb0e9g487dgaeb5g995a7933875c: |I knew it. The moment I saw you, I knew you were the same as me.|
hee643c23g7cf1g42b4gb00egff6ca29f2d3a: |I bow to the Nightsinger as well. Your secret is safe with me.|
h7b41ad83ga51ag4e1bg922ag15b44461d39d: Wouldn't you know - that makes two of us.
h00191edag5140g4484ga79fg3e25971dc69e: And if we meet more, well, all the merrier, yeah?
h5abe3dabg61c0g47eegb410gde01cac7e19f: |I knew it. The moment I saw you, I knew you were the same as me.|
h1a3abc5agd76fg4b72ga94bg2fed261100a7: |I bow to the Nightsinger as well. Your secret is safe with me.|
h3d5ded68g8993g4d1cgb477gbba70b6eb35c: Waste your prayers as you please. Each god is as impotent as the next.
h4f90d043gd9eag43f9g92d1g83216eb62d39: But do ensure us a reverent welcome, should we encounter these Sharrans.
h995ce5c2gca04g44f6g9c86g004330fec883: You worship Shar? That is... That's beyond troubling.
hb290c913g33a8g4090gb130g6e0772b532b8: But we've come this far together, and I can't just dismiss that out of hand. Let me think on this. More words will follow later.
h98976a4dgdca1g4a3bgbb30ga4bca656ca76: |I see... I wish you'd told me sooner. I would have understood. Or would have tried to.|
h9fd7e62eg816dg49f6gaba0gbd852209a05c: |We can talk about this later. Let's keep going.|
h6a12b1ebg5260g4a89gbe61gacf27d062133: That's it? I was hoping for something a little juicier, to be honest.
he0a09299g4a96g499eg92d9g27370a35452e: But we're friends. You can always confide in me. I'm not about to judge you.
h7b9f68f6g7c9dg4679g8d2egae4438ac72fb: Now, let's go. Maybe we'll bump into those Shar-worshipping friends of yours.
h6eb48f5eg3570g4c29ga53agedbba0c1c05a: |I see... I wish you'd told me sooner. I would have understood. Or would have tried to.|
h4afbc876g70b0g4ebdg99c7g4fa4144f3fc5: |We can talk about this later. Let's keep going.|
ha7d541dagb00fg46edgad08g900237dfcbd0: I'll be - to think I didn't see the signs. I guess the pretty face was a distraction.
h297a9798gb8afg47b1g9361geb838cac52f8: If we find these other Sharran, you'll have to introduce me.
haf5c217cgc53bg4d3aga84ag89524be3abcc: |I see... I wish you'd told me sooner. I would have understood. Or would have tried to.|
h794e09e6g9ae9g457ag9036gc18f728a86fb: |We can talk about this later. Let's keep going.|
hf99bc112g1ba7g4166ga8a0g51235cc5cb8f: You thought to deceive me? That makes you either a threat - or a fool.
h3c10fd11gf6efg425dga6dag89405efa7c01: We need each other - this isn't the time to doubt our alliance.
hadb3c9d6g8716g4d3fga10dg4595b9dccbef: Waste your prayers as you please. Each god is as impotent as the next.
hcd3f3e15g3c5eg4a53g9ad1gb09031dfb6b2: But do ensure us a reverent welcome, should we encounter these Sharrans.

h36e835cbg5296g4447g91b2g496137359897: But I don't want our journey to end either. We've stood by each other, fought for one another.
he4ac6cfcga0f1g4d27g8872g3e8168018e13: That's worth something, despite this - this chasm between us.
h096426f4g8dbdg440cg8045gd9dacc6e5a2a: Mystra forgive me. Now let us continue.
h8868964dg9bf7g49dbgbeddgd0a09b7b9159: |Let's keep moving. But we're not done talking about this.|
h0c7b90b5gb12fg4751gae2cgdf8089b0dcd9: Fine. I'll give you one more chance. It's not like we've got an abundance of allies anyway.
h5dccbbf5g72feg4447g9f02g5e8dd56fb684: But we will have a conversation about this, young lady.
h88dcb797gfc25g4e48ga8e8g9d6b775bcde4: |Let's keep moving. But we're not done talking about this.|
h4ff35d6ag1b2cg4395gbe4eg8841914e8471: |Let's keep moving. But we're not done talking about this.|
h829cc064gaba9g4d9bga9efg167df0a857a5: Fine. But If we run into these Sharrans, do put in a good word for me, yeah?
hd96c3143gcfe5g4ed1gafcfg849bb00be99e: They're not apt to give the Blade of Frontiers a warm welcome.
hf080a60agc8bdg4b57g9f16gd4c3d2a81917: You've proven a liability. I won't tolerate another moment.
h7515451fg9e19g422dg9bf4gbe0512fbcaaf: No. You lie: lie with every shadowed breath you take.
hf73e885egc44cg4b5egaccdg00165bbe7c11: It's over. This is where we part ways. I'll not be led down the stairs of madness.
hc86e81afgd5a7g4f02g958cgf75ddd27d39d: Oh just shut up. You've said more than enough already.
he08c1187g6b6cg406eg9c5ag0bc48bfb2c2a: I won't follow some deluded Shar worshipper to whatever grim end awaits you. We're done.
h8d475678gd7eeg4322g9f35g780631c41506: I've seen a lot in my day - some good, some bad. But rarely such deception.
h57afdcafg97c7g4806gbe7agf6e9492035e5: I won't hinder your journey. But I won't be joining it.
h00df0579g4fd3g400cg9d83gbcbb720e3018: I misspoke - I know of Shar but don't worship her.
he6be831bgec02g4a90ga5adg23b8ec8f9f42: Leave, if it troubles you so much. I'd be fine without you.
h4141a600g1f1cg43c6g88cbg73484d5e52f1: Shadowheart, that is admission is beyond troubling. How can I still trust you? I... I don't know if I can.
h20a9e116g4d98g4b2bgb0c2g2eb3774d34e2: |I should have known you were hiding something from me. I don't know if I can trust you.|

h395b1480g0c8cg4400g9b8bg4147881cf45b: You deceitful little cur - to think I followed you so far!
hafe65b04g4a71g4183gbf17gbdb1f3caa251: |I should have known you were hiding something from me. I don't know if I can trust you.|

h411f100eg264cg4ef5gb077g2c946891760d: What else are you hiding? Not sure I should be sticking around.

h50d5e0b4g4915g4873g8a09gfe8aa5fa059b: I follow Shar. I recognised the signs of her faithful.
h83185735gf022g4c36gba83g97a5e6f19002: Just an inkling. And there was no magic - just a trick of the light.
h6245363agfcebg4effg87a5gbf9abf338af7: Very well - if you speak it, I trust it.
hf634348eg1f5ag48b7g92aag06488b9cf7f8: Onward, then. Should we meet Sharrans, I will insist on a reverent welcome.
h957aaa31ga95fg45a6gac03g9ec7fce08aab: Fine. But I want you to know that I trust you, Shadowheart. And I hope that one day, you will trust me.

h27875071g61beg458egb4a6g24c2fdb6ebfc: |And that was enough for you to come to that conclusion...? All right, if you say so. I trust you.|
h7556eaaag957ag441bg9fa8gdf2cccf25c62: Far it it from me to question that half-elf intuition.
h8a54ace4gc66fg40fag88c9gdb5feef7169e: Let's hope we catch these Sharrans on a good day.

h90d43f72g1326g49d9gb0d3ga74dea82e0d8: By seduction or sword, the truth always outs.
he41c59a2g8f9cg4e50gb18cg4b72facae8a3: Have it your way. I'll not care if my care is so easily dismissed.

hf6b8ed02gfd0dg4951gb132g42f9982b01a0: But have it your way. The truth will out eventually.

hbd59307fgfa50g4b62gb6a9g41a3e36cd810: Don't think I don't realise there's a deeper truth still hidden. There's more to this than you're letting on.
